claims.statement: Great Wall of China length is at least 6× larger than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in water is slower than Peregrine falcon dive.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in water: 5328 km/h. Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h.

claims.statement: Seikan Tunnel length is shorter than Great Barrier Reef length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer strings on a violin than keys on a standard piano.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 4 strings vs 88 keys.

claims.statement: Telephone patented happened after First iPhone released.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Telephone patented: 1876. First iPhone released: 2007.
